createDataAgentFewshotRequest.question: What are the top 5 busiest pickup locations?
createDataAgentFewshotRequest.query: SELECT TOP 5 pickup_location, COUNT(*) as trip_count FROM dbo.Trip GROUP BY pickup_location ORDER BY trip_count DESC

body.question: What are the top 5 busiest pickup locations?
body.query: SELECT TOP 5 pickup_location, COUNT(*) as trip_count FROM dbo.Trip GROUP BY pickup_location ORDER BY trip_count DESC
